title: Cavity Prevention Measures * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Cavity Prevention Measures * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Older Adults Veterans Native American Community AIDS/HIV Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DENTAL PROGRAM DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental care to people living with HIV. Clinic services include preventative care, restorative care, dentures, and bridge work. For clients that need to travel to access services, transportation and travel lodging may be available. 2460 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: People living with HIV who are enrolled in HIV Alliance Care Coordination services Hours: Call for information Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE DENTAL PROGRAM
